response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with strong web, testing, and craftsmanship background, but the role centers on 8+ years of C++ for a cloud compute platform. The resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months) and a bachelor thesis; primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang. Distributed systems exposure exists (Sociomantic) but in DLang, and there is no evidence of formal technical leadership of a cloud compute platform or large team mentoring.
strengths: Broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput services
Strong testing/TDD culture, workshops, and open-source tooling (Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
Some low-latency distributed-systems work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
concerns: Far below the 8-year C++ minimum — only short C/C++ exposure at National Instruments
No demonstrated cloud compute platform or production cloud architecture leadership
No explicit technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform leadership
